upcoming_events.name: Pre-Season Training Camp
upcoming_events.description: Two-day intensive training camp open to all squads. Focus on fitness, team structures, and Rotterdam preparation. Attendance strongly encouraged for Rotterdam-bound players.

upcoming_events.name: Friendly vs Singapore Masters
upcoming_events.location: Siu Sai Wan Sports Ground, HK
upcoming_events.description: International friendly match against Singapore Masters. All four squads in action over a full day of competitive hockey.

upcoming_events.name: Annual Club Dinner
upcoming_events.description: Our annual club dinner and awards night. Celebrating the season's achievements and bidding farewell to the Rotterdam-bound squads.

upcoming_events.name: Rotterdam 2026 World Masters Cup
upcoming_events.description: The premier masters field hockey tournament in the world. HK Masters sends four squads to compete against nations from across the globe.

past_events.name: Asia Pacific Masters Championship
past_events.result: M35: Semi-finalists | M45: Champions | W35: Group stage
past_events.description: Outstanding performance from our M45 squad who claimed gold, while M35 reached the semi-finals. A memorable tournament for the club.

past_events.name: HK Club Championship
past_events.location: Siu Sai Wan Sports Ground, HK
past_events.description: The annual Hong Kong Club Championship brought all local masters clubs together for a weekend of great hockey.

tournament_archive.name: WMH Asia Championship 2025
tournament_archive.description: HK Masters hosted the World Masters Hockey Asia Championship 2025 here in Hong Kong. The full tournament site includes match schedules, visitor information, results, and all the details from this landmark event.
